refactor(axvirtio-blk): move parse_virtio_block_header to device.rs

- Update related imports and usages
- This change prepares for implementing header parsing in the transport layer

head_commit.message:
refactor(memory): remove GuestMemoryAccessor and use AddressTranslator directly

- Remove GuestMemoryAccessor struct and its implementations
- Use AddressTranslator directly in BlockRequest, VirtioMmioBlockDevice, and queue modules
- Update related functions and methods to work with AddressTranslator
- Simplify memory access operations by removing indirection through GuestMemoryAccessor
